## Affected layers

- [ ] MATLAB model or tests
- [ ] Python validation or reports
- [ ] Portable C99 runtime
- [ ] CMake or CI
- [ ] Documentation or generated evidence only

## Model and compatibility review

- [ ] Equations, units, state ordering, signs, initial conditions, and sampling assumptions are explicit.
- [ ] Public MATLAB, Python, C, CMake, report, and metric interfaces remain compatible or changes are documented.
- [ ] MATLAB, Python, and C representations remain semantically aligned where they implement the same model.
- [ ] Attribution and simulation limitations remain accurate.

## Verification


- [ ] Important numerical changes have analytical, independent, or cross-language evidence.
- [ ] Saturation, disturbance, invalid-input, and tolerance behavior were checked where relevant.
- [ ] Generated figures and reports were regenerated or verified as current.
- [ ] The verification matrix was updated if requirements or tests changed.
